public_api_additions: func (o *Orchestrator) EndSplit(fileID uint64, outcome catalog.RecordStatus) (catalog.CatalogRecord, error)
downstream_consumers_not_yet_wired: engine/catalog/content.go ContentStore.Append (future writer-admission wiring, out of scope for 2b.1.3)
issue #12 execute.go (expected to call EndSplit(fileID, catalog.StatusSplit) once real split content/redirect data is committed)
risk_notes: Highest-risk correctness surface per AGENT.md: touches reader/writer interaction directly, unlike 2b.1.1/2b.1.2's isolated primitives.

Must not introduce any new locking scheme beyond FileGuard (already race-proven) + Catalog's existing per-fileID stripe lock (via Get/Put) + WAL-before-apply (via AppendAndApply) -- composition only, no new primitive.
Must not regress engine/catalog, engine/mvcc, or engine/btree test suites (regression gates in self-consistency).
